doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The EDPB did not exist in 2014, the cited position contradicts the actual IAB Europe (C-604/22) ruling and EDPB doctrine on pseudonymization, and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The position contradicts established EDPB doctrine and the IAB Europe judgment (which actually reinforced that pseudonymized data often remains personal data), and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 exists; the cited "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" is also not a real EDPB document (the EDPB did not exist in 2014).
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB did not exist in 2014, the cited position contradicts the actual IAB Europe (C-604/22) ruling and EDPB doctrine on pseudonymization, and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 exists.
